title: ammannia octandra
intro: Ammannia octandra, also known as Kalmegh or Indian birthwort, is a plant species belonging to the family Lythraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ammannia octandra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Ammannia octandra can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various health conditions.
